content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against `b171754e8a490bb73f29419fb47f323217b502a4` and found 1 fix-now correctness issue in the new final-review retry loop.

## Amendments

1. Timeout retries in final review do not honor the existing retry policy. `invoke_final_review_member` hard-codes `retry_policy.max_attempts(FailureClass::TransportFailure)` at `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:2424-2426`, but the configured policy gives `FailureClass::Timeout` only 3 attempts at `src/contexts/workflow_composition/retry_policy.rs:54-64`. As written, persistent reviewer/arbiter timeouts will consume 5 full timeout windows before failing instead of the intended 3.
   Rationale: Use the observed failure class when consulting `RetryPolicy` for retryability and `max_attempts` (or at minimum special-case `FailureClass::Timeout`). Otherwise final-review timeouts diverge from the shared retry semantics the rest of the workflow uses and can stall runs for two extra timeout periods.
